LAW AND MOTION, 302, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE INSTRUCTED THE COURT THAT IT NEVER RECEIVED THE CREDITOR'S OPPOSITION TO THE DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE SHERIFF THEREFORE RELEASED THE FUNDS. JUDGE: SUZANNE BOLANOS; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR # 7489; DEPT. 302. =302/SB

calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. PHIL PHILIP, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SHARON O. PHELAN'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is off calendar as moot. The Sheriff's office instructed the court that it never received the creditor's opposition to the debtor's claim of exemption. The Sheriff therefore released the funds. Judge: Suzanne Bolanos; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =302/sb
